title: ZXSpace Tips & Strategy
description: Improve your ZXSpace skills with practical advice for protecting your cities, managing shields, and surviving longer alien invasions.
summary: Careful positioning, shield management, and smart use of power-ups will help you survive longer and achieve higher scores.

sections.heading: Protect Your Cities
paragraphs: Your cities are your most valuable resource. Destroy alien formations before they break through your shields and reach the buildings below.
The longer you keep your cities intact, the greater your chances of surviving the later waves and achieving higher scores.

sections.heading: Use Your Shields Wisely
paragraphs: Shields provide valuable protection, but they won't last forever. Use them to absorb enemy fire while you reposition your cannon or prepare your next attack.
Repair damaged shields whenever a Shield Repair power-up becomes available to keep your defences strong.
bullets: Repair damaged shield sections whenever possible.
Avoid letting aliens repeatedly attack the same area.
Keep enough distance between the aliens and your cities.

sections.heading: Achieve Higher Scores
paragraphs: Higher-value aliens and bonus UFOs can dramatically increase your score, but don't risk your cities chasing every bonus target.
Use Double Laser during the busiest moments to clear large groups of enemies quickly and regain control of the battlefield.

images.caption: Protect your cities, survive longer, and achieve higher scores.

featureShowcases.heading: Defend Smarter, Survive Longer
featureShowcases.summary: Simple improvements in positioning, shield management, and power-up timing can dramatically improve your performance.
body: ZXSpace rewards players who stay calm under pressure. Learning when to defend, when to attack, and when to collect power-ups will help you survive more waves and protect more cities.
Whether you're chasing a new high score or preparing for tougher waves, every game is another opportunity to improve.

image.caption: Every wave is another opportunity to improve.
